author: bsunanda
body:
#### PR description:

Backport the modified scripts in HGCalGeometry/Geometry and SimG4CMS/Calo due to changes and bug fixes in the V19 version of HGCal Geometry

#### PR validation:

Tested in CMSSW_V17_0_X

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

Backport of #50832 and #50860
title: Phase2-hgx366G Backport the modified scripts in HGCalGeometry/Geometry and SimG4CMS/Calo due to changes and bug fixes in the V19 version of HGCal Geometry
